name: Kourakuen Holdings Corporation
summary: Kourakuen Holdings Corporation operates a chain of restaurants under the Korakuen name in Japan. As of November 11, 2020, it operated 456 stores. The company was formerly known as Kourakuen Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kourakuen Holdings Corporation in 2015. Kourakuen Holdings Corporation was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Koriyama, Japan.
